meaning: n.旧式的英国土风舞adj.煮后没有加调味料就上桌的
examples: The French aristocracy then learned of these useful items from their English friends and called them "Capote Anglaise" - English Raincoats.
My father drove the same car in his later years and, since he died before Sara met him, I thought she could commune with him on a kind of spiritual voyage a la facon anglaise.
Over the course of its existence, the brand collected several patents, including one for its first waterproof trunk in 1854 and the ultralight Maille Anglaise in wicker that was introduced in 1873.
